positive: A central, symmetrical mandala composition featuring a celestial fox spirit. The style is ornate, neo-tribal, and highly detailed line art, combining elements of cosmic nebulae, crystalline geometric patterns, and stylized woodland flora. The fox silhouette must be sharp and clean, rendered in gold foil accents and deep sapphire ink. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette (deep indigo, sapphire blue, burnt gold, and stark white). The composition should mimic a detailed tattoo flash design, with intricate dot work and bold, clean outlines, optimized for textile printing. Full body shot, centered composition, dramatic contrast lighting, vector illustration quality, high resolution, flat graphic design.
